programmes.show_description: Connor Phillips is live through the night from the Salford Riviera with Midnight Mastermind, Wish You Were There and the first Midnight Caller of the week.

programmes.show_description: Jamie has classics from New Orleans legend Sweet Emma Barrett and pianist Duke Pearson, new releases from Jeff Goldblum and Nubiyan Twist, plus BBC Introducing artist Eve Buckley.

programmes.show_name: One Hit Wonders with OJ Borg
programmes.show_description: OJ's replaying part of his chat with Leanne Brown from Sweet Female Attitude, as it's 26 years this month since Flowers reached number 2 in the UK. Plus, even more tracks from 2000.

programmes.show_description: Vernon unleashes a heavyweight selection of iconic 90s dance bass lines. Back-to-back bangers from Daft Punk, Roni Size, Double 99, Mr Oizo, Les Rythmes Digitales and many more!
